name: No Stealing
desc:
When this card is activated: Return control of all monsters on the field to their owners.
While this card is face-up in the Spell & Trap Zone, it is unaffected by other card effects.
Neither player can Tribute monsters their opponent owns for a Summon, or use them as Fusion, Synchro, Xyz, or Link Material.
Neither player can take control of monsters owned by their opponent, nor Special Summon monsters owned by their opponent to their field.
